message:
feat(demo): expand code explorer with view modes and pane hit areas

Enhances the CodeExplorer demo screen with multiple view modes and
improved mouse interaction support.

New ExplorerMode enum:
- Source: Default explorer view with hotspots (existing functionality)
- QueryLab: SQL studio with live preview mode
- ExecutionPlan: Plan graph with IO telemetry visualization

Keyboard controls:
- m: Cycle to next view mode
- M (Shift+m): Cycle to previous view mode

Pane hit area registration:
- Register code panel, sidebar, and status bar for mouse focus
- Conditional hit area for search/goto overlays when active
- Enables click-to-focus behavior across all panels

Structural changes:
- Add mode field to CodeExplorer state
- Add ExplorerMode enum with next()/prev()/label()/subtitle() methods
- Extend keybindings() to document new mode switching controls
- Update render() to register hit areas via chrome module

This makes the code explorer a better demonstration of:
- Multi-mode widget patterns
- Mouse interaction with keyboard alternatives
- Panel-based focus management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
